title: lomaridium fragile
side_effects: Lomaridium fragile can have side effects if used improperly, such as causing gastrointestinal issues like nausea, vomiting, and diarrhea, as well as allergic reactions like skin rashes and itching. Prolonged use or excessive consumption may lead to more severe complications, including liver damage and kidney strain. In rare cases, improper use of the plant may also cause cardiovascular problems, such as irregular heartbeat and blood pressure fluctuations. Additionally, using Lomaridium fragile for medicinal purposes without proper guidance can lead to interactions with other medications, resulting in unpredictable outcomes.
